requirement_topic.en: CA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: CA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: CA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain a CA type approval certificate from the Communications Authority of Kenya before importation or sale in Kenya, under the Kenya Information and Communications Act Cap 411A and associated type approval regulations. The CA mark must appear on the product and its packaging. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by the CA.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《肯尼亚信息与通信法》第411A章及相关型式批准法规，在进口或于肯尼亚销售前取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）颁发的型式批准证书。CA标志须标注于产品及包装上。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被CA视为等同认可。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《肯尼亞資訊與通訊法》第411A章及相關型式批准法規，在進口或於肯尼亞銷售前取得肯尼亞通訊管理局（CA）頒發的型式批准證書。CA標誌須標注於產品及包裝上。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被CA視為等同認可。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Information and Communications Act Cap 411A
Communications Authority of Kenya Type Approval Regulations

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 15844, GB 8702) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Communications Authority of Kenya.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在肯尼亚通信管理局不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在肯尼亞通訊管理局不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate CA type approval certificate required from the Communications Authority of Kenya. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Kenya. The CA mark must be displayed on product label and packaging.
gap.zh: 须另行取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）颁发的强制性型式批准证书。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在肯尼亚不具法律效力。CA标志须标注于产品标签及包装上。
gap.zht: 須另行取得肯尼亞通訊管理局（CA）頒發的強制性型式批准證書。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在肯尼亞不具法律效力。CA標誌須標注於產品標籤及包裝上。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Kenya. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by the CA. A separate CA type approval process must be completed and the CA mark displayed on the product and packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CA型式批准对于所有在肯尼亚进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被CA承认。须完成独立的CA型式批准程序，并在产品及包装上显示CA标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CA型式批准對於所有在肯尼亞進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被CA承認。須完成獨立的CA型式批准程序，並在產品及包裝上顯示CA標誌。
